_comment: Sidecar metadata for Minecraft server.properties (plan 53 Phase 0). The file is the source of truth; this adds grouping/labels/descriptions/restart-required so config_form.build_form() renders a real grouped form. Keys not listed here still appear, in an implicit 'other' group. restart_required flags fields the running server won't pick up live.

motd.label: Server Message (MOTD)
motd.description: The message shown in the client's server list.

hardcore.label: Hardcore
hardcore.description: One life; death bans the player.

pvp.label: PvP
pvp.description: Allow players to damage each other.

level-name.label: World Name
level-name.description: Folder name of the world save.

level-seed.label: World Seed
level-seed.description: Seed for world generation (blank = random). Only affects a fresh world.

enforce-whitelist.label: Enforce Whitelist
enforce-whitelist.description: Kick non-whitelisted players already online when the whitelist reloads.

online-mode.label: Online Mode
online-mode.description: Verify players against Mojang auth. Turn off ONLY for offline/LAN play.

spawn-protection.label: Spawn Protection Radius
spawn-protection.description: Blocks around spawn only ops can modify.

enable-rcon.label: Enable RCON
enable-rcon.description: Remote console. ServerKit uses this — leave on.

view-distance.label: View Distance
view-distance.description: Chunks sent to players. Lower = less CPU/RAM.

max-tick-time.label: Max Tick Time (ms)
max-tick-time.description: Watchdog: crash the server if a tick exceeds this. -1 disables.
